title: remove ArgoCD, add secrets:sync task
description:
## Summary

- ArgoCD removed entirely (`argocd/`, `Taskfile.argocd.yml`, `argocd.md` docs page) — with mentolder and korczewski now fully independent k3s clusters there is no federation value
- New `task secrets:sync` applies SealedSecrets to both prod clusters without touching workloads — secrets update only when you explicitly trigger it
- Workload rollouts remain fully manual via `task feature:*` or `task workspace:deploy ENV=<env>`
- `argocd.argoproj.io/sync-options` annotations removed from coturn/collabora secrets (were inert without ArgoCD; `sealedsecrets.bitnami.com/managed` stays)
- `argocd` namespace removed from TLS reflector CronJob and wildcard cert reflection list
- All docs, architecture diagrams, glossary, adminhandbuch, environments guide updated

## Test plan

- [x] `task test:manifests` — all 24 checks pass
- [x] `task workspace:validate` — kustomize dry-run clean
- [ ] After merge: `task secrets:sync` smoke test against both prod clusters
